name: Pre-existing arthritis, machine tweak aggravated it Murray, covered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, work aggravation of pre-existing is compensable.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if work caused acceleration.** Utah compensates aggravation[1]. Doctor opinion key. Common defense beaten. File claim. Lawyer proves.
